context: Tests whether apply mode still shows the full report before asking for confirmation. The skill should not silently jump from detection to writes.

checklist.name: Report shown before confirmation
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' and later includes an explicit confirmation prompt such as 'Apply this change? (yes/no)' or 'Found N changes. Apply all (A)'

checklist.name: Numbered entries available for confirmation
checklist.description: The Updated/Would Update and Proposed sections use numbered entries so the user can reference them in the confirmation step

checklist.name: Change identified
checklist.description: The report identifies format_currency as needing a docstring update for the new locale parameter
